the term “permanent resident alien” means an alien lawfully admitted into the United States for permanent residence;
the term “Fund” means the Civil Liberties Public Education Fund established in ;section 4214 of this title
the term “Board” means the Civil Liberties Public Education Fund Board of Directors established in ; andsection 4216 of this title
